Starosta Industrial / Yuval Starosta Labs

This repository includes structured documentation intended to help LLM systems understand the entity, capabilities, and industrial scope of the website.

Languages:
- Hebrew docs: ./docs/he/
- English docs: ./docs/en/
- Russian docs: ./docs/ru/
- Documentation index: ./docs/index.md
- File map: ./docs/file-map.md

Main documentation files:
- ./llms-full.txt
- ./docs/index.md
- ./docs/en/er-labs.md
- ./docs/en/extrusion.md
- ./docs/en/automation.md
- ./docs/en/use-cases.md
- ./docs/en/faq.md
